learnings: Both produce identical outcomes on trivial tasks — differentiation comes from verification
Maina used 20% fewer tokens, 22% less time
Spec Kit produces more documentation artifacts (4 files vs 0)
Maina agent only used MCP tools, should also use CLI (maina init, plan, spec, commit)
Need to track intermediate failures, retry count, per-step timing
On trivial tasks, tooling overhead dominates — tier 2 should test where verification catches real bugs
